interpretation.label: Mild
interpretation.action: Monitor closely

interpretation.label: Moderate
interpretation.action: Consider CT head, neuro referral

interpretation.label: Severe
interpretation.action: Intubate, CT head immediately, neurosurgical referral

interpretation.label: Low risk
interpretation.action: C-spine imaging NOT indicated — clinical clearance possible

interpretation.label: High risk
interpretation.action: C-spine imaging indicated

components.name: Dangerous mechanism (fall >1m, axial load, high-speed MVC, rollover, bicycle/ejected)
Delayed onset of neck pain (>12h after injury)?

interpretation.label: Imaging required
interpretation.action: C-spine CT/X-ray indicated — high-risk factors present

interpretation.label: Low risk
interpretation.action: Range of motion testing — if full ROM, no imaging needed

interpretation.label: No imaging
interpretation.action: C-spine imaging NOT indicated — clinically clear

interpretation.label: Unlikely appendicitis
interpretation.action: Observe — CT abdomen if clinical concern

interpretation.label: Possible appendicitis
interpretation.action: CT abdomen with contrast — surgical consult

interpretation.label: Probable appendicitis
interpretation.action: Surgical consult — prepare for theatre

interpretation.label: Low risk
interpretation.action: Observation — discharge with precautions

interpretation.label: Intermediate risk
interpretation.action: Imaging (USS/CT) — surgical review

interpretation.label: High risk
interpretation.action: Surgical consult — likely appendicitis

components.name: Active cancer (treatment within 6 months or palliative)
Paralysis, paresis, or recent plaster immobilisation of lower extremity
Recently bedridden >3 days or major surgery within 4 weeks
Localised tenderness along deep venous system
Calf swelling >3cm compared to asymptomatic leg
Pitting oedema confined to symptomatic leg
Alternative diagnosis as likely or more likely than DVT

interpretation.label: DVT unlikely
interpretation.action: D-dimer — if negative, exclude DVT

interpretation.label: DVT likely
interpretation.action: Compression USS immediately

components.name: Clinical signs of DVT (minimum 3 points leg swelling and pain with palpation of deep veins)
Alternative diagnosis less likely than PE
Immobilisation ≥3 days or surgery in previous 4 weeks

interpretation.label: PE unlikely
interpretation.action: PERC rule → D-dimer if PERC not met

interpretation.label: PE likely
interpretation.action: CTPA immediately

interpretation.label: PE excluded
interpretation.action: No further testing needed — PE ruled out

interpretation.label: PERC not met
interpretation.action: Proceed to Wells score or D-dimer

components.name: Blood pressure: SBP <90 or DBP ≤60 mmHg

interpretation.label: Low risk
interpretation.action: Consider outpatient treatment — mortality <1%

interpretation.label: Intermediate risk
interpretation.action: Consider short hospitalisation or outpatient — mortality 9%

interpretation.label: High risk
interpretation.action: Admit to hospital — severe pneumonia — mortality 15-40%

interpretation.label: Unlikely thyroid storm
interpretation.action: Consider alternative diagnosis

interpretation.label: Possible thyroid storm
interpretation.action: Treat as thyroid storm — admit ICU

interpretation.label: Highly likely thyroid storm
interpretation.action: Immediate ICU admission — aggressive management
